name: Deviled Ham Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the muffins and spread butter on each cut side.
2. Core but do not peel the apple rings.
3. Slice 24 equal pieces of cheddar cheese (12 triangles).
4. Combine deviled ham with oregano, spreading it onto the toasted muffin halves.
5. Place an apple ring on top of the ham mixture.
6. Arrange two cheddar cheese slices on each muffin and broil until melted.
7. Serve immediately.
